commands.description: Pass runtime parameters directly from the CLI to the report engine.
Set headless mode in the configuration to prevent GUI errors when running BIRT on Linux servers without an X11 display.
Programmatically switch the report output format within the script engine using the Emitter API.
Specify the output target type (e.g., html, pptx, xls) explicitly via the CLI runner.
Tune performance and resource management by adjusting the session timeout in the BIRT Engine configuration.
